message:
test: add watchdog unit tests for degraded status acceptance (#5834)

Tests for checkBackendHealth, health evaluation logic, and the full
degraded-backend proxy flow. Ensures "degraded" status is treated
as healthy so the UI loads when no clusters are reachable.

Refs #5804

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
